item.title: Forging a Decorative Finial
item.description: Watch a blacksmith forge a decorative finial from raw steel. See the heating, shaping, and finishing steps that turn simple metal into detailed ironwork.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Decorative Finial
media:content.media:description: Watch a blacksmith forge a decorative finial from raw steel. See the heating, shaping, and finishing steps that turn simple metal into detailed ironwork.

item.title: Making the Back Plate for a Forged Quilt Square
item.description: Watch the process of creating a back plate for a forged quilt square. See the metal shaping, fitting, and finishing needed to complete the handcrafted piece.

media:content.media:title: Making the Back Plate for a Forged Quilt Square
media:content.media:description: Watch the process of creating a back plate for a forged quilt square. See the metal shaping, fitting, and finishing needed to complete the handcrafted piece.

item.title: How to Silence an Anvil Ring
item.description: Learn how a blacksmith reduces the loud ringing of an anvil. See a simple method that improves shop comfort while keeping forging work efficient.

media:content.media:title: How to Silence an Anvil Ring
media:content.media:description: Learn how a blacksmith reduces the loud ringing of an anvil. See a simple method that improves shop comfort while keeping forging work efficient.

item.title: How to Make Cold-Forged Hinges
item.description: Learn how to create durable cold-forged hinges with simple tools and techniques. A practical look at shaping metal into functional hardware.

media:content.media:title: How to Make Cold-Forged Hinges
media:content.media:description: Learn how to create durable cold-forged hinges with simple tools and techniques. A practical look at shaping metal into functional hardware.

item.title: Forge Your Own Simple Bottle Opener
item.description: Watch a blacksmith create a strong, functional bottle opener. Step-by-step forging techniques make this useful tool easy to craft at home.

media:content.media:title: Forge Your Own Simple Bottle Opener
media:content.media:description: Watch a blacksmith create a strong, functional bottle opener. Step-by-step forging techniques make this useful tool easy to craft at home.

item.title: Are Tent Stakes Really Profitable?
item.description: Explore the business of making and selling tent stakes. Learn about production costs, demand, and potential profits in this practical look at small-scale manufacturing.

media:content.media:title: Are Tent Stakes Really Profitable?
media:content.media:description: Explore the business of making and selling tent stakes. Learn about production costs, demand, and potential profits in this practical look at small-scale manufacturing.

item.title: From Steel Cable to Hand-Forged Axe
item.description: Watch a blacksmith transform steel cable into a durable axe. See the forging, shaping, and finishing steps that turn raw material into a functional tool.

media:content.media:title: From Steel Cable to Hand-Forged Axe
media:content.media:description: Watch a blacksmith transform steel cable into a durable axe. See the forging, shaping, and finishing steps that turn raw material into a functional tool.

item.title: Coal Forge Fire Tips for Beginner Blacksmiths
item.description: Learn how to manage a coal forge fire with practical tips and advice. A helpful guide for beginner blacksmiths on heat control, safety, and efficient forging.

media:content.media:title: Coal Forge Fire Tips for Beginner Blacksmiths
media:content.media:description: Learn how to manage a coal forge fire with practical tips and advice. A helpful guide for beginner blacksmiths on heat control, safety, and efficient forging.

item.title: Beginner Blacksmith Project: Split Cross
item.description: Learn how to forge a split cross in this beginner-friendly blacksmithing project. See the basic heating, cutting, and shaping techniques used to form the design.

media:content.media:title: Beginner Blacksmith Project: Split Cross
media:content.media:description: Learn how to forge a split cross in this beginner-friendly blacksmithing project. See the basic heating, cutting, and shaping techniques used to form the design.

item.title: Forging a Pineapple Twist Design
item.description: Watch a blacksmith create a pineapple twist pattern in metal. Step-by-step forging techniques show how to shape and finish this decorative design.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Pineapple Twist Design
media:content.media:description: Watch a blacksmith create a pineapple twist pattern in metal. Step-by-step forging techniques show how to shape and finish this decorative design.

item.title: Hook of the Week: Railroad Spike Hook
item.description: Watch a blacksmith turn a railroad spike into a durable hook. See the forging, shaping, and finishing that create this practical shop or home tool.

media:content.media:title: Hook of the Week: Railroad Spike Hook
media:content.media:description: Watch a blacksmith turn a railroad spike into a durable hook. See the forging, shaping, and finishing that create this practical shop or home tool.

item.title: How to Forge a Side Chisel
item.description: Learn step-by-step how to forge a side chisel. See the heating, shaping, and finishing techniques used to create this precise and functional blacksmithing tool.

media:content.media:title: How to Forge a Side Chisel
media:content.media:description: Learn step-by-step how to forge a side chisel. See the heating, shaping, and finishing techniques used to create this precise and functional blacksmithing tool.

item.title: Testing the New Fontanini Anvil
item.description: Watch a blacksmith put the new Fontanini anvil to work. See how it handles forging, shaping, and finishing metal projects with precision and strength.

media:content.media:title: Testing the New Fontanini Anvil
media:content.media:description: Watch a blacksmith put the new Fontanini anvil to work. See how it handles forging, shaping, and finishing metal projects with precision and strength.
